title: Add non-record SP8192 proxy-stack submission (3-seed)
author: gmn0105
novel_contributions: Switching the Track-P proxy stack from SP4096 to SP8192 under the same 10-minute wallclock budget on 1×H100 improves validation BPB.
Uses a 5-shard FineWeb screening setup with three seeds to demonstrate reproducible gains.
Reports both pre-quantization post-EMA validation BPB and final int6 sliding-window BPB.
